{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/286391906?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/alanturing881", "id": 286391906, "login": "alanturing881", "node_id": "U_kgDOERH-Yg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59730", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Impact

With `trailingSlash: 'always'` configured, the `@astrojs/node` standalone server's static file handler appends a trailing slash to request paths and issues a `301` redirect. Paths beginning with `/\` (slash-backslash) were not recognized as internal paths, so the handler would echo the raw path back in the `Location` header. Because browsers treat `\` as `/` per the WHATWG URL specification, the resulting redirect could resolve to an external host.

**Preconditions:**
- `trailingSlash: 'always'` must be set (non-default; the default is `'ignore'`)
- The request path must not have a file extension in its final segment
- An attacker must deliver the crafted link to a user

### Patches

Fixed by treating backslash-prefixed paths the same as `//`-prefixed paths in `isInternalPath()`, so they are no longer rewritten with a trailing slash.

### Workarounds

Use the default `trailingSlash: 'ignore'` setting, which does not issue trailing-slash redirects in the static file handler.

### References

- [WHATWG URL spec: backslash normalization](https://url.spec.whatwg.org/#url-parsing)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r557-wffq-wvrc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-20T23:22:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r557-wffq-wvrc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r557-wffq-wvrc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59730"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-20T23:22:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/withastro/astro/security/advisories/GHSA-r557-wffq-wvrc", "https://github.com/withastro/astro/pull/17252", "https://github.com/withastro/astro/commit/eb6f97e391ee587747e37609c255c7cd4b9cce3c", "https://github.com/withastro/astro/releases/tag/@astrojs/node@11.0.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r557-wffq-wvrc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/withastro/astro/security-advisories/GHSA-r557-wffq-wvrc", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/withastro/astro", "summary": "@astrojs/node: Backslash-prefixed paths not recognized as internal by trailing-slash redirect", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T23:22:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r557-wffq-wvrc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "11.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@astrojs/node"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 8.1.0, < 11.0.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @astrojs/node: Backslash-prefixed paths not recognized as internal by trailing-slash redirect
